---
format:
  gfm:
    wrap: auto
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: true
---

<a name="top"></a>

:::{.content-visible when-meta="sections.preamble"}
{{< include _preamble.md >}}
:::

```{=html}
<p align="center">
  <img src="{{ site.baseurl }}{{< meta image >}}" alt="{{< meta img_alttext >}}" style="width: 750px; height: auto;">
</p>
```

In this issue:

--------

:::{.content-visible when-meta="sections.headline"}
{{< include _headline.md >}}
:::

:::{.content-visible when-meta="sections.conference"}
{{< include _conference.md >}}
:::

:::{.content-visible when-meta="sections.execupdate"}
{{< include _execupdate.md >}}
:::

:::{.content-visible when-meta="sections.scupdate"}
{{< include _scupdate.md >}}
:::

:::{.content-visible when-meta="sections.orgmember"}
{{< include _orgmember.md >}}
:::

:::{.content-visible when-meta="sections.communityfunds"}
{{< include _communityfunds.md >}}
:::

:::{.content-visible when-meta="sections.news"}
{{< include _news.md >}}

Our next meeting is scheduled for {{< meta next_meeting_date >}}. We hope to see you there!
--------
:::

:::{.content-visible when-meta="sections.events"}
{{< include _events.md >}}
:::

:::{.content-visible when-meta="sections.reads"}
{{< include _reads.md >}}
:::

:::{.content-visible when-meta="sections.involved"}
{{< include _involved.md >}}
:::

:::{.content-visible when-meta="sections.jobs"}
{{< include _jobs.md >}}
:::

**This newsletter is a joint effort of members of the US-RSE Association.**

```{=markdown}
© US-RSE • 2021–{{ 'now' | date: "%Y" }} • US-RSE is a fiscally sponsored project of [Community Initiatives](http://communityin.org/)

[Email](mailto:contact@us-rse.org) [Mastodon](https://fosstodon.org/@us_rse) [Twitter](https://twitter.com/us_rse) [YouTube](https://youtube.com/@us_rse) [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/company/us-rse/) [GitHub](https://github.com/USRSE)
```
